pi_items.source: Verified across setup_task.sh (line 17), export_result.sh (line 40), and verifier.py (line 62). Confirmed against Nuxeo official documentation that /default-domain/workspaces/ is the standard path structure for shared workspaces in Nuxeo Platform.
Verified in task.json description, export_result.sh (line 37 - TARGET_TITLE variable), and verifier.py (line 70 - expected_title variable). Consistent across all task files.
Verified in task.json description, setup_task.sh (lines 34, 39, 42, 59, 80, 82, 100, 109 - document creation with name 'Draft_Agenda'). Consistent as the source document name in Personal Workspace.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves moving a document named 'Draft_Agenda' from the Personal Workspace (/default-domain/UserWorkspaces/Administrator) to the shared Projects workspace at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects, then renaming it to 'Board_Meeting_Agenda_Oct2023'. The original document UUID must be preserved (verified by verifier.py checking doc_status.uid equality). All metadata values are consistent with Nuxeo Platform's standard path structure for workspaces and user workspaces. The task uses synthetic PDF data (either from /workspace/data/annual_report_2023.pdf or a minimal generated PDF).
